item.title: Frontier AI models will continue pushing the limits in scientific research, biology and the physical sciences. But open-source models will handle what most people actually need every day. As we can se
item.description: pFrontier AI models will continue pushing the limits in scientific research, biology and the physical sciences.br /br /But open-source models will handle what most people actually need every day.br /br /As we can see, open-weight models are getting much cheaper and more useful as well.br /br /For th

item.title: Models Can't Remember Their Training. Neither Can You.
item.description: pstrongAI involvement disclosure:/strong This essay was written in extended collaboration with two Claude models (Anthropic), and it involved heavier collaboration than my first two essays. The framework, thesis, claims, and prose are mine. Claude Opus 4.7 contributed citation retrieval and verifica

item.title: Alibaba launches a preview of Qwen3.8 Max, describing it as comparable to the frontier models of all but Anthropic.
item.description: pAlibaba launches a preview of Qwen3.8 Max, describing it as comparable to the frontier models of all but Anthropic./phr /blockquotebAlibaba Group (@AlibabaGroup)/bppMeet Qwen3.8-Max-Preview, our latest LLM with 2.4 trillion parameters, fully multimodal capabilities, and sharper performance in code

item.title: In terms of AI capex worth remembering a US nuclear air craft carrier is $13b US is going to spend more than that easily on AGI dominance, defence spending gonna pump
item.description: pIn terms of AI capex worth remembering a US nuclear air craft carrier is $13bbr /br /US is going to spend more than that easily on AGI dominance, defence spending gonna pump/p

item.title: K3 and other open source models are obviously insanely bullish for compute and RAM. Inference was always going to be almost all high performance compute usage. More people that can do inference = more
item.description: pK3 and other open source models are obviously insanely bullish for compute and RAM.br /br /Inference was always going to be almost all high performance compute usage.br /br /More people that can do inference = more demand./p

item.title: Save the date: Swiss AI Safety Days 2026 (7-8 November, ETH Zurich)
item.description: pspanSwiss AI Safety Days 2026 is the next chapter of the Zurich AI Safety Day. Last year, our inaugural 2025 event was named Best Event in Swiss AI Weeks. It set the bar for a new format of AI safety conferences being replicated in Europe, and brought together 200+ participants and 20+ organisation

item.title: I am pretty sure the open weight release of stable diffusion was accelerationist & led to huge capex As to whether it was AI communism eh
item.description: pI am pretty sure the open weight release of stable diffusion was accelerationist &amp; led to huge capexbr /br /As to whether it was AI communism eh/p

item.title: reminder This is game changing for Agentic future! "Richard Sutton, the father of Reinforcement Learning and Turing Award winner, has launched Oak Lab to pursue a radically different path toward AGI."
item.description: preminderbr /br /This is game changing for Agentic future!br /br /"Richard Sutton, the father of Reinforcement Learning and Turing Award winner, has launched Oak Lab to pursue a radically different path toward AGI."br /br /"Their long-term goal is a trillion-parameter AI agent that can learn continu

item.title: New AI blood test predicts heart disease 15 years early
item.description: A new AI-powered blood test could give people a remarkably early warning of serious heart and circulation problems. Developed by researchers at the University of Hong Kong, CardiOmicScore analyzes thousands of proteins and metabolites to estimate the risk of six major cardiovascular diseases, includ

It was two days of big ideas and diverse perspectives. Researchers, policymakers, industry practitioners and civil society grou

item.title: José explains why crypto projects need a clearer link between tokens and equity. "I think what we found is the vast majority of valuable crypto projects need an equity company... We need to figure out
item.description: pJosé explains why crypto projects need a clearer link between tokens and equity.br /br /"I think what we found is the vast majority of valuable crypto projects need an equity company... We need to figure out a structure for where the token can have some kind of programmatic or contractual value cap

item.title: My "Payorian FairBot" was just the original FairBot

item.title: You can use K3 as a teacher model (with logits!) to train up smaller dense models. It’s actually feasible even to use it to create a trillion token full pre and post training dataset for even better m
item.description: pYou can use K3 as a teacher model (with logits!) to train up smaller dense models.br /br /It’s actually feasible even to use it to create a trillion token full pre and post training dataset for even better models./phr /blockquotebTeortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞) (@teortaxesTex)/bppFor people w

item.title: 'Coinbase Man' Token Crashes as Armstrong Swaps His Avatar for a CryptoPunk
item.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong set his X profile picture to the artwork behind a Base memecoin, then replaced it with a newly acquired CryptoPunk. The $BRIAN token round-tripped from obscurity to millions and back, a stark test of how far one social cue can move an onchain market.

item.title: Alex Wissner-Gross predicts AI will transform civilization within the next decade. - GPT-2 was the moment humanity discovered how to build superintelligence. - AI is the ultimate forcing function that
item.description: pAlex Wissner-Gross predicts AI will transform civilization within the next decade.br /br /- GPT-2 was the moment humanity discovered how to build superintelligence.br /br /- AI is the ultimate forcing function that will accelerate every scientific field.br /br /- AI will bulk-solve mathematics, unl

item.title: Endogenous Alignment
item.description: pspanStarting when children are fairly young, usually around 1 year of age, we adults begin the work of aligning them to our values. We teach them to say “please”, not to hit, to ask for what they want instead of screaming, and much else. We do this primarily via exogenous methods, using a combinati

item.title: Weekly Project Updates: Ethereum Institutional Privacy Firm Launches, Robinhood Chain Ecosystem Booms, PumpFun Completes First Team Token Unlock, Base Undergoes Strategic Pivot, etc
